versions.version_description: Chords and text throughout the whole song and easier to use.

Accents have been added to enhance the base and 7th notes Played in D as it was initially played makes the A with thumb over on the base E string in the F# position easier. I was unable to work the strum arrows so it goes dud.ddd/ dud.d.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
NOTE: This strumming pattern above was not added by me.  I don't know if it's correct or not. 
I pluck/tap when I play it like this: http://www.liveloveguitar.com/ed-sheeran-thinking-loud-guitar-chords/
 

     EADGBe  
Am7 [x02010] -  If you can't hear a difference between the C and
  C [032010]    Am7, make SURE you're strumming both chords
                correctly- you HAVE to strum the A string with
                each chord.
  
**********************************************************************************

NOTE- When transposed up 2x's to remove the capo, use D/F# for the Bm7 (Am7).
      A C/E sounds the same as a C so it didn't work for this CAPO ON 2 version. 
      And I repeat-  THIS IS A CAPO ON 2 VERSION!!! 
**********************************************************************************

Send in your guitar chords song request @ www.liveloveguitar.com



[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]                         
 When your legs don't work [/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]             [ch]G[/ch] 
Like they used to before[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am7[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch] 
 And I can't sweep you off of your feet[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]                        
 Will your mouth still remember [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
The taste of my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]          [ch]Am7[/ch]                
 Will your eyes still smile [/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]
From your cheeks                        [/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
And darling I will be loving you 'til we're seventy[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]  
And baby my heart could still fall as hard at twenty-three[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]G[/ch]
And I'm thinking 'bout how [/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
People fall in love in mysterious ways[/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                        [ch]G[/ch]
Maybe just the touch of a hand[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]Am[/ch]
Well me I fall in love with you every single day [/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]  
And I just wanna tell you I am[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]         [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
So honey now[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
Take me into your loving arms [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
Kiss me under the light of a thousand stars [/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
Place your head on my beating heart [/tab]
[tab]             [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
I'm thinking out loud[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]Am[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
And maybe we  found love right where we are[/tab]


[Verse]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]                       [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
 When my hairs all but gone and my memory fades[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]                      [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
 And the crowds don't remember my name[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]        [ch]Am7[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
 When my hands don't play the strings the same way, mmm[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am7[/ch]                        [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]
I know you will still love me the same[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]             [ch]F[/ch]    [ch]G[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]G[/ch]
Cause honey your soul could never grow old it's evergreen[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]    [ch]Am7[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]  [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]  
And baby your smile's forever in my mind and memory[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]G[/ch]
I'm thinking 'bout how[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus] 

[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
People fall in love in mysterious ways[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Dm[/ch]                       [ch]G[/ch]
And maybe it's all part of a plan[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Dm[/ch]                           [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
Well I'll just keep on making the same mistakes [/tab]
[tab][ch]Dm[/ch]                      [ch]G[/ch]   
Hoping that you'll understand[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]
Take me into your loving arms [/tab]
[tab]        [ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]           [ch]Am7[/ch]  [ch]F[/ch]

[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]                  [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Am7[/ch]
